prompt: 볼링 게임 Game 클래스 구현해줘. roll(pins), score() 메서드 필요해
assertions: transcript.md shows at least one test written and run to a failing (RED) state before any production code existed
for each scenario (open frame, spare, strike, perfect game, 10th-frame bonus), a test exists that specifically covers it
final test suite run passes with zero failures and no errors/warnings in the captured output
no per-frame/intermediate score method or pin-count/frame-count validation was added (out of scope per the kata)
production code was not written speculatively beyond what was needed to pass the current test (no unused config/flexibility)
